category_sources: source_facts.description says SpiderMonkey is a JavaScript-C engine; official spidermonkey.dev describes Mozilla's JavaScript and WebAssembly engine.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is spidermonkey; official spidermonkey.dev brands the project as SpiderMonkey.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SpiderMonkey site; official Firefox Source Docs has a dedicated SpiderMonkey documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Mozilla SpiderMonkey Team GitHub profile says SpiderMonkey source code lives in the Firefox code base, and the mozilla-firefox/firefox repository contains js/src.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a JavaScript engine; official spidermonkey.dev describes JavaScript/WebAssembly support, embedding, and standalone shell usage.
